load-pdf-verify.title: Load PDF Document and Verify
load-pdf-verify.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and confirming it was loaded by checking the page count.

check-pdf-encryption.title: Check PDF Encryption Status and Apply Security
check-pdf-encryption.description: Shows how to determine if a PDF is encrypted and then encrypt or decrypt it using Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-pdf-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password using PdfFileSecurity
decrypt-pdf-owner-password.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt an encrypted PDF using the owner password via PdfFileSecurity.

encrypt-pdf-aes256.title: Encrypt PDF with 256‑bit AES
encrypt-pdf-aes256.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using 256‑bit AES with user and owner passwords.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑40 Algorithm
encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using the RC4‑40 algorithm and a user password.

encrypt-aes256-privileges.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Custom Privileges
encrypt-aes256-privileges.description: Demonstrates applying AES‑256 encryption and specific permissions to a PDF in a single step.

change-pdf-password.title: Change User Password of Encrypted PDF
change-pdf-password.description: Demonstrates how to change the user password of an encrypted PDF while preserving its existing encryption settings using Aspose.Pdf.

update-owner-password.title: Update Owner Password of Protected PDF
update-owner-password.description: Demonstrates how to change only the owner password of an encrypted PDF while preserving the user password and existing permissions.

change-pdf-passwords.title: Change PDF User and Owner Passwords in One Call
change-pdf-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to change both the user and owner passwords of an encrypted PDF using the PdfFileSecurity.ChangePassword overload.

set-pdf-privileges.title: Set PDF Privileges: Allow Printing, Disallow Copying
set-pdf-privileges.description: Demonstrates how to set PDF security privileges to allow printing while preventing copying using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-privileges-form-fill-disable-ass.title: Set PDF Privileges to Allow Form Filling and Disable Assembly
set-pdf-privileges-form-fill-disable-ass.description: Demonstrates how to configure PDF security so users can fill form fields while preventing document assembly.

disable-copy-while-allow-print.title: Disable Copying While Keeping Printing Enabled in PDF
disable-copy-while-allow-print.description: Demonstrates how to disable the copy permission and keep printing enabled for a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity and DocumentPrivilege.

remove-usage-rights.title: Remove Extended Usage Rights from Signed PDF
remove-usage-rights.description: Demonstrates how to remove extended usage rights from a signed PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature.

detect-usage-rights.title: Detect Extended Usage Rights in PDF
detect-usage-rights.description: Shows how to check if a PDF file contains extended usage rights using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature.

verify-usage-rights-removal.title: Verify PDF Usage Rights Removal
verify-usage-rights-removal.description: Demonstrates removing usage rights from a PDF using PdfFileSignature and verifying the removal with ContainsUsageRights.

encrypt-pdf-with-exception-logging.title: Encrypt PDF with Detailed Exception Logging
encrypt-pdf-with-exception-logging.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, handling any errors, and logging detailed exception information.

encrypt-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Encrypt PDF and Save to MemoryStream
encrypt-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with a user and owner password and saving the encrypted document to a MemoryStream for network transmission.

encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.title: Encrypt PDF from Byte Array and Return Encrypted Bytes
encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, encrypts it with a user and owner password, and returns the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

encrypt-pdf-user-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
encrypt-pdf-user-password-only.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using a user password while leaving the owner password undefined.

apply-password-protection.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF without Recreating Document
apply-password-protection.description: Demonstrates how to add user and owner passwords to an existing PDF using PdfFileSecurity without loading the document into a Document object.

display-pdf-encryption-algorithm.title: Display PDF Encryption Algorithm
display-pdf-encryption-algorithm.description: Loads a PDF file, checks if it is encrypted, and prints the encryption algorithm used by the document.

validate-pdf-encryption.title: Validate PDF Encryption Before Decryption
validate-pdf-encryption.description: Shows how to check if a PDF is encrypted and decrypt it only when needed, avoiding unnecessary exceptions.

batch-encrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs in a Directory
batch-encrypt-pdfs.description: Encrypts every PDF file in a folder using the same user and owner passwords, producing encrypted copies with a suffix.

batch-decrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Decrypt PDFs Using Owner Passwords
batch-decrypt-pdfs.description: Decrypts multiple encrypted PDF files using owner passwords read from a configuration file.

batch-change-pdf-user-password.title: Batch Change PDF User Passwords
batch-change-pdf-user-password.description: Iterates through a folder of PDF files and updates each file's user password to a standardized value using Aspose.Pdf.

update-owner-passwords.title: Update Owner Passwords of Multiple PDFs
update-owner-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to change the owner password of several PDF files while keeping their existing user passwords unchanged.

encrypt-pdf-by-filename.title: Encrypt PDFs with Algorithm Based on File Name
encrypt-pdf-by-filename.description: Encrypts each PDF in a folder using a CryptoAlgorithm chosen from the file name (e.g., rc4 or aes256) and saves the encrypted files.

verify-pdf-encryption.title: Verify PDF Encryption Algorithm and Generate Report
verify-pdf-encryption.description: Scans a folder of PDFs, checks whether each file is encrypted and reports the encryption algorithm (if detectable).

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128.title: Encrypt PDF with Printing and Editing Permissions using RC4‑128
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128.description: Demonstrates how to combine printing and editing permissions and encrypt a PDF using RC4‑128 encryption.

load-decrypt-modify-pdf.title: Load, Decrypt If Encrypted, Modify, and Save PDF
load-decrypt-modify-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, decrypting it when encrypted, adding a text fragment, and saving the result.

encrypt-decrypt-pdf.title: Encrypt and Decrypt PDF with Verification
encrypt-decrypt-pdf.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using PdfFileSecurity, decrypting it, and verifying that the original and decrypted documents have the same page count.

encrypt-pdf-performance.title: Encrypt PDFs with Performance Timing
encrypt-pdf-performance.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files while logging the time taken for each encryption operation.

encrypt-pdf-aes256__v2.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-aes256__v2.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF file with AES‑256 using Aspose.Pdf and saving the encrypted result.

decrypt-pdf-azure-keyvault.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password (Azure Key Vault Placeholder)
decrypt-pdf-azure-keyvault.description: Demonstrates decrypting an encrypted PDF by using the owner password, which would normally be securely obtained from Azure Key Vault.

batch-change-pdf-passwords.title: Batch Change PDF User and Owner Passwords from CSV
batch-change-pdf-passwords.description: Reads a CSV file listing PDFs and their passwords, then updates both user and owner passwords for each PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-40__v2.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40
encrypt-pdf-rc4-40__v2.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF provided as a stream using RC4‑40 encryption and return the encrypted PDF as a stream.

pdf-encryption-summary.title: Generate Encryption Summary for PDFs
pdf-encryption-summary.description: Scans a folder of PDF files and creates a text summary listing each file’s encryption status, algorithm, and privileges.

verify-decryption-fails-wrong-owner.title: Verify Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
verify-decryption-fails-wrong-owner.description: Creates an encrypted PDF and attempts to decrypt it using an incorrect owner password, demonstrating that decryption fails.

change-pdf-user-password.title: Change PDF User Password While Preserving Encryption
change-pdf-user-password.description: Demonstrates how to change the user password of an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity without altering other encryption settings.

disable-copy-print.title: Disable Copying While Enabling Printing for PDF
disable-copy-print.description: Demonstrates how to disable the copy permission and keep printing enabled on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-privilege.title: Set PDF Privilege Using PdfFileSecurity
set-pdf-privilege.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF privileges with PdfFileSecurity without using the deprecated AllowExceptions property.

encrypt-pdf-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
encrypt-pdf-user-password.description: Encrypts a PDF using a user password while leaving the owner password undefined, causing Aspose.PDF to generate a random owner password.

apply-pdf-password-protection.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF Using PdfFileSecurity
apply-pdf-password-protection.description: Demonstrates how to add user and owner passwords to an existing PDF file without creating a Document object, using PdfFileSecurity.

retrieve-encryption-algorithm.title: Retrieve PDF Encryption Algorithm
retrieve-encryption-algorithm.description: Loads a PDF file and displays the encryption algorithm used, or indicates that the document is not encrypted.

change-pdf-user-password__v2.title: Change User Password for PDFs in a Folder
change-pdf-user-password__v2.description: Iterates through all PDF files in a folder and updates each file's user password to a standardized value using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.title: Encrypt PDFs with Algorithm Based on File Name
encrypt-pdfs-by-filename.description: Encrypts each PDF in a folder using a CryptoAlgorithm selected from the file name (high, medium, or default) and saves the encrypted files.

encrypt-rc4-128-print-edit.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 allowing printing and editing
encrypt-rc4-128-print-edit.description: Demonstrates how to combine printing and editing permissions and encrypt a PDF using RC4‑128.

encrypt-pdfs-performance.title: Encrypt PDFs with Performance Timing
encrypt-pdfs-performance.description: Encrypts each PDF in a folder while logging the time taken for each encryption.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-bucket.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Save to Cloud Bucket
encrypt-pdf-aes256-bucket.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using AES‑256 with Aspose.Pdf and saving the encrypted file to a simulated cloud storage bucket.

decrypt-pdf-owner-password__v2.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password (Simulated Azure Key Vault)
decrypt-pdf-owner-password__v2.description: Shows how to decrypt an encrypted PDF using the owner password retrieved from a secure source (e.g., Azure Key Vault) with Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdfs-directory-archive.title: Encrypt PDFs in a Directory and Archive Them
encrypt-pdfs-directory-archive.description: Demonstrates a one‑shot console app that encrypts each PDF found in a folder using Aspose.Pdf and moves the encrypted files to an archive folder.

change-pdf-passwords-csv.title: Change PDF Passwords from CSV List
change-pdf-passwords-csv.description: Reads a CSV file with PDF paths and passwords, then updates both user and owner passwords for each PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF provided as a stream with RC4‑40 encryption and return the encrypted PDF as a stream using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-decryption-fails-incorrect-owner-.title: Verify Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
verify-decryption-fails-incorrect-owner-.description: Creates a PDF, encrypts it, then attempts to decrypt with a wrong owner password and confirms the operation fails.
